title: Minimum-evidence escalation for low-n_episodes regimes
source: Loop A ticks 002 + 003 verdicts. DA flagged `n_episodes=3` as a HIGH structural ceiling on statistical validity in both ticks. Plus context: BULL_QUIET is the only `sample_sufficient` regime on XAU; the others are tagged `sample_insufficient` by [phase5/regime_stats.py](phase5/regime_stats.py). Loop A is trapped on a 3-episode regime.
why: A regime with only 3 episodes provides 3 quasi-independent samples regardless of bar count. Walk-forward folds within those episodes are autocorrelated. ANY proposal here is statistically weak unless cross-episode survival is required. The DA correctly raises this every tick, and any "survivor" passing BULL_QUIET-only audit is not statistically meaningful.
value_rationale: M (downgraded from H in 2026-05-27 recalibration — timely now that T011D2 exists, but B0040 must ship first or no survivor can reach an audit where per-episode escalation would even apply. Will revert to H once B0040 ships)
scope: Extend [phase5/proposal.py](phase5/proposal.py) `falsification_criterion` schema with optional `per_episode_sharpe_floor` (float) and `per_episode_min_survivors` (int). When set, audit must compute per-episode Sharpe and require survival in ≥ `per_episode_min_survivors` episodes (default: `ceil(n_episodes * 2/3)`).
Modify [.claude/agents/phase5-hypothesizer.md](.claude/agents/phase5-hypothesizer.md) to AUTO-INCLUDE the per-episode field when `n_episodes < 5` in the dossier.
Modify [phase5/run_proposal.py](phase5/run_proposal.py) `evaluate_against_falsification` to honor the new fields.
out_of_scope: B0032 H4 calibration patch is a separate problem (sklearn `n_splits > n_samples`). B0035 is a D1 audit semantics change.

history.reason: Unblocked by B0040 (just shipped) — per its value_rationale reverts to H now that custom survivors can reach an audit. Addresses DA recurring HIGH on low-n_episodes regimes.

Cross-episode survival sign test (user-chosen over literal per-episode Sharpe — episodes too small for reliable Sharpe). FalsificationCriterion gains per_episode_survival_fraction (None=off) + per_episode_min_trades(5) + per_episode_net_pnl_margin(0.0). Pipeline persists strategy_pnl_threshold50.parquet (per-model per-event net pnl at threshold 0.50, NaN when not taken). New evaluate_per_episode in run_proposal: episode active iff >=min_trades trades, survives iff net pnl>margin; passes iff survivors>=ceil(fraction*n_active) with n_active>=2 (cannot assess cross-episode robustness on a single episode). Integrated into run() per-model loop — only fires for models already clearing the per-fold criterion; failing it flips verdict to falsified_per_episode. Recommended default fraction 0.6 (robust 60 pct majority; avoids the 0.667>2/3 float trap). Hypothesizer doc instructs auto-include when dossier n_episodes<5 (the DA recurring HIGH). REGIMES_DIR made a module constant for testability. Tests: tests/phase5/test_b0035_per_episode_survival.py (12: schema validation + majority pass/fail + inactive-episode exclusion + <2-active guard + not-applicable + missing-artifact). 562/562 pass.
feat(B0035): cross-episode survival sign test for low-n_episodes regimes
